description: Visual damage assessment from a vehicle photograph. Flat schema (no deep nesting) optimized for the prebuilt-image base analyzer.

view_angle.description: Primary camera viewing angle relative to the vehicle. Determine FIRST: if you can see the FRONT (grille/headlights), apply the mirror rule (image-right = vehicle LEFT). If you can see the REAR (tail lights/trunk), image-right = vehicle RIGHT. Left/right is the VEHICLE's own left/right (driver-perspective facing forward), NOT the image's left/right.

camera_description.description: One-sentence description of the camera position and angle, e.g. 'Slightly elevated front-left view showing hood, front bumper, and left fender.'

vehicle_count.description: Number of distinct vehicles visible in the image.

vehicle_type.description: Primary vehicle body type, e.g. sedan, SUV, pickup, hatchback, coupe, van.

vehicle_make.description: Manufacturer of the primary vehicle, e.g. Toyota, Ford, Honda. Empty string if not determinable.

vehicle_model.description: Model of the primary vehicle, e.g. Camry, F-150, Civic. Empty string if not determinable.

vehicle_color.description: Primary color of the vehicle, e.g. silver, black, white.

model_year_estimate.description: Approximate model year or year range based on visible styling, e.g. '2018-2021'. Empty string if not determinable.

license_plate_visible.description: True if a license plate is visible in the image.

license_plate_text.description: License plate text if clearly readable; empty string otherwise.

visible_vehicle_parts.description: List of vehicle parts/panels visible in the image given the camera angle, e.g. ['hood','front bumper','front-left fender','front-left headlight']. Left/right MUST use the VEHICLE's own frame of reference and MUST match view_angle.

has_visible_damage.description: True if any damage is visible on the vehicle.

overall_severity.description: Overall damage severity for the vehicle as visible in this image.

damage_locations.description: Locations on the vehicle where damage is visible, using VEHICLE's own left/right (matching view_angle). Examples: 'front-left fender', 'rear-right quarter panel', 'driver-side door'.

affected_parts.description: Distinct parts/panels affected by damage. Side labels MUST match view_angle. Examples: ['front bumper','left fender','left headlight assembly'].

damage_description.description: 2-4 sentence narrative description of the damage observed: where it is, what type, how severe, and any noteworthy details (e.g. paint transfer, fluid leaks, deployed airbags through windshield).

estimated_repair_complexity.description: Rough repair complexity tier based on visible damage.

scene_context.description: Brief description of the surroundings if relevant (e.g. 'parking lot in daylight', 'roadside at night with rain'). Empty string if not relevant.

image_quality_notes.description: Caveats about image quality that limit assessment, e.g. 'low light obscures rear quarter panel', 'reflection on hood'. Empty string if image is clear.
